hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.go) go fmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; *.rb) bundle exec rubocop -a "$FILE" --no-color 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.ts|*.tsx) PROJ=$(realpath "$FILE"); while [ "$PROJ" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$PROJ/package.json" ]; do PROJ=$(dirname "$PROJ"); done; [ -f "$PROJ/package.json" ] && cd "$PROJ" && yarn eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac

INPUT=$(cat 2>/dev/null); TRANSCRIPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.transcript_path // empty'); TMUX_WIN=$([ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux display-message -p '#S' 2>/dev/null || echo "");LAST_MSG=$(jq -r 'select(.type == "assistant") | .message.content[] | select(.type == "text") | .text' "$TRANSCRIPT" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | awk '{m=NF<10?NF:10; s=""; for(i=1;i<=m;i++) s=s (i>1?" ":"" ) $i; if(NF>10) s=s "..."; print s}'); TITLE=$([ -n "$TMUX_WIN" ] && echo "Terminal:$TMUX_WIN" || echo "Terminal"); terminal-notifier -title "$TITLE" -message "${LAST_MSG:-Task complete}" -sound Glass 2>/dev/null || afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff

TMUX_WIN=$([ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux display-message -p '#S' 2>/dev/null || echo ""); TITLE=$([ -n "$TMUX_WIN" ] && echo "Terminal:$TMUX_WIN" || echo "Terminal"); terminal-notifier -title "$TITLE" -message "Approval needed" -sound Basso 2>/dev/null || afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Basso.aiff

TMUX_WIN=$([ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux display-message -p '#S' 2>/dev/null || echo ""); TITLE=$([ -n "$TMUX_WIN" ] && echo "Terminal:$TMUX_WIN" || echo "Terminal"); terminal-notifier -title "$TITLE" -message "Needs clarification" -sound Basso 2>/dev/null || afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Basso.aiff

TMUX_WIN=$([ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux display-message -p '#S' 2>/dev/null || echo ""); TITLE=$([ -n "$TMUX_WIN" ] && echo "Terminal:$TMUX_WIN" || echo "Terminal"); terminal-notifier -title "$TITLE" -message "Compacting context..." -sound Purr 2>/dev/null || afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Purr.aiff
